currencies.name: US Dollar
headlines: Dollar weakness persists on Trump tariff threats (Canada/Korea)
USD/JPY breaks 100 DMA (153.54) on BoJ intervention risks
US Durable Goods beat (5.3%) but ignored due to tariff fears
currencies.reaction: DXY weakness driven by tariff salvo. USD/JPY down sharply.

currencies.name: Euro
headlines: German IFO Business Climate misses (84.2 vs 85.0)
ECB speakers signal potential for 50bps cut in March
EUR/USD stuck in range ahead of FOMC
currencies.reaction: Euro remains heavy on weak data but supported by weak USD.

currencies.name: British Pound
headlines: CBI Distributive Trades survey beats expectations
BoE's Mann reiterates hawkish stance on services inflation
GBP/USD tests 1.2700 resistance
currencies.reaction: Outperformer. Strong data + Hawkish BoE = Bid.

currencies.name: Australian Dollar
headlines: Copper prices surge to new highs on China stimulus hopes

Inflation expectations remain elevated
currencies.reaction: Resilient. Commodities doing the heavy lifting.

currencies.name: Canadian Dollar
headlines: Trump threatens 25% tariff on all Canadian imports
Oil prices slip on demand concerns
USD/CAD spikes to 1.3600
currencies.reaction: Underperformer. Tariff threat is an existential risk for CAD.

currencies.name: Japanese Yen
headlines: Safe-haven flows dominate on geopolitical tension
BoJ official hints at 'decisive action' on FX
Yield spread compression aids JPY
currencies.reaction: Strongest G10. Perfect storm of Risk-Off + BoJ threats.

currencies.name: Swiss Franc
headlines: Ukraine escalation drives flows into Franc
EUR/CHF tests parity again
SNB sight deposits show minimal intervention
currencies.reaction: Classic safe-haven bid. Outperforming EUR and USD.

currencies.name: New Zealand Dollar
headlines: Quiet session with little domestic news
Tracking AUD higher but lagging

currencies.reaction: Follower. Drifting higher with AUD but lacks own catalyst.
